Class RedisNode.RedisNodeBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.RedisNode.RedisNodeBuilder
Direct Known Subclasses:
RedisClusterNode.RedisClusterNodeBuilder
Enclosing class:
RedisNode
public static class RedisNode.RedisNodeBuilder extends Object
Builder for creating new RedisNode.
Since:
1.4
Author:
Christoph Strobl
